message:
feat(audio): use XDG_STATE_HOME for tool state and extract to tmpdir

Fall back to $XDG_STATE_HOME/franken_whisper or
$HOME/.local/state/franken_whisper before the legacy .franken_whisper
directory. Extract ffmpeg bundles into the OS temp directory to avoid
polluting the state cache with transient archives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
